_doc: Tunable knobs surfaced by Phase 7. Each entry: where it lives, current default, sweep range to explore, success metric. phase7_tune.py runs sweeps and emits a sensitivity table. After the corpus run, edit the source defaults if a sweep value clearly wins.

knobs.name: max_total_papers
knobs.metric: claims_inserted_per_topic / pubmed_calls_per_topic — higher is better up to plateau
knobs.rationale: Global cap per topic. Too low = under-saturated; too high = LLM cost balloons on broad topics.

knobs.name: duplicate_ratio_threshold
knobs.metric: papers_to_saturation — fewer is cheaper, but too aggressive misses tail novelty
knobs.rationale: Saturation early-stop sensitivity inside one query.

knobs.name: saturation_window
knobs.metric: false_saturation_rate — % of stops that re-trigger with novelty if cap raised
knobs.rationale: Window size for the duplicate-ratio rolling check.

knobs.name: salience.unread_threshold_days
knobs.metric: fraction_archived_in_one_pass — should be near 0 on a healthy corpus
knobs.rationale: Days idle before grace_score decays. Too short = active concepts archived; too long = stale clutter.

knobs.name: salience.decay_step
knobs.metric: passes_to_archive_from_fresh — at default = 7 passes from 1.0 to ≤0.3

knobs.name: salience.archive_floor
knobs.metric: archive_recall — manual review of archived entities; floor ↑ = more aggressive
knobs.rationale: Score at which an entity's claims move to brain/archive/.
